audio.title: Deep Space Pulse
audio.category_zh: 游戏交互音乐设计 · Wwise
audio.description_zh: 一首为科幻题材游戏设计的多层交互音乐。采用 Wwise 垂直叠加与水平重分割两种动态切换逻辑，将音乐拆分为环境铺底、节奏驱动、旋律主题及强化装饰四条独立轨道，并分别映射至游戏内实时状态参数。140 BPM 的工业电子节拍由模块化合成器音序驱动，低频部分以次低频脉冲构建重力感，高频区域通过频率调制与环形调制生成金属质感碎片。各音轨在音量、滤波器截止频率及空间混响发送量三个维度上接受 RTPC 实时控制，实现探索、警戒、战斗三档强度之间的连续过渡，无段落切换的听觉断裂感。
audio.description_en: A multi-layer interactive music piece designed for sci-fi game contexts. Built on Wwise vertical layering and horizontal re-segmentation logic, the music is split into four independent stems — ambient pad, rhythm drive, melodic theme, and intensity ornament — each mapped to real-time in-game state parameters. A 140 BPM industrial electronic beat is driven by modular synthesizer sequences, with sub-bass pulses providing gravitational weight and high-frequency FM/ring-modulated metallic fragments populating the upper spectrum. Each stem receives independent RTPC control across three axes: volume, filter cutoff frequency, and spatial reverb send, enabling continuous transitions between exploration, alert, and combat intensity states without perceptible segment breaks.
audio.tech: 48kHz/24bit · Wwise Interactive Framework · RTPC · State Switching · Vertical Layering
audio.tech_zh: 48kHz/24bit · Wwise 交互框架 · RTPC · 状态切换 · 垂直叠加

audio.title: 沉浮
audio.category_zh: 实验电子音乐 · 声音艺术
audio.description_zh: 一首时长八分钟的电子声音作品，围绕「沉」与「浮」的概念展开。低频部分使用了持续音合成与次谐波发生器，产生的低频声团在 30-80Hz 区间缓慢移动，形成压迫性的声音基底。中高频区域通过颗粒合成技术将原声采样切分为毫秒级粒子，经过随机化重排与音高偏移后，产生类似气泡上升的离散音群。节奏层面没有使用固定的四四拍推进，而是在 131 BPM 附近持续变化——某些段落凝聚为工业打击乐的机械重复，另一些段落则完全解构为无节拍的声音纹理。全曲动态跨度较大，安静段落接近听觉阈值，密集段落则通过多层失真与压缩推开响度上限。结构上采用了变奏曲式思维，一个核心音高集合在不同音色、不同密度下反复出现与变形。
audio.description_en: An eight-minute electronic sound work centered on the duality of submersion and emergence. The low-frequency layer employs drone synthesis and subharmonic generation, producing slow-moving tone clusters between 30-80Hz that create an oppressive sonic foundation. The mid-to-high register uses granular synthesis to slice acoustic samples into millisecond-scale grains, which are then randomized in order and pitch-shifted, generating discrete sound groups resembling ascending bubbles. Rhythmically the piece avoids fixed four-on-the-floor patterns, instead fluctuating around 131 BPM — certain passages condense into mechanical industrial percussion loops, while others deconstruct entirely into meterless sound textures. The dynamic range is wide, with quiet sections approaching the hearing threshold and dense passages pushing loudness limits through multi-stage distortion and compression. Structurally the work adopts a variation-based approach: a core pitch-class set recurs and transforms across different timbres and densities throughout the piece.
audio.tech: 48kHz/24bit · Granular Synthesis · Drone · Subharmonic Generation · Variation Form
audio.tech_zh: 48kHz/24bit · 颗粒合成 · 持续音 · 次谐波发生器 · 变奏曲式

audio.title: Electronic Beat
audio.category_zh: 电子音乐制作 · Synthwave 流行电子
audio.description_zh: 一首结构紧凑的流行电子器乐作品，时长 1 分 28 秒。节奏组以 100 BPM 的中速律动为基础，底鼓经过瞬态塑形处理，突出起音阶段的冲击力；拍手音色叠加了短混响与高频空气感均衡，使其在混音中保持存在感但不掩盖其他声部。主旋律合成器在 1-4kHz 频段中游走，使用了振荡器同步与滤波器包络调制来产生音色随时间的变化。副歌段落通过增加双层和声叠置、打开滤波器截止频率以及侧链压缩产生的节奏性抽吸效果来制造推进力。整体混音方面，低频由底鼓与贝斯分担，中低频留给和弦铺底，中高频交给主旋律与人声采样，各频段基本保持了合理的分离度与响度平衡。风格上融合了 Synthwave 的复古模拟质感和现代 K-Pop 电子编曲的处理方式。
audio.description_en: A compact pop-electronic instrumental, 1 minute 28 seconds in duration. The rhythm section is built on a 100 BPM mid-tempo groove, with the kick drum transient-shaped for attack impact; the clap texture is treated with short reverb and high-frequency air EQ to maintain presence without masking other elements. The lead synthesizer operates in the 1-4kHz range, using oscillator sync and filter envelope modulation to generate timbral variation over time. The chorus sections build momentum through double-layer harmonic stacking, filter cutoff opening, and rhythmic pumping from sidechain compression. In terms of overall mix, the low end is shared between kick and bass, the low-mids are reserved for chord pads, and the upper mids carry the lead melody and vocal samples, with each frequency range maintaining reasonable separation and loudness balance. Stylistically it blends the retro analog character of Synthwave with production techniques common in modern K-Pop electronic arrangement.
audio.tech: 48kHz/24bit · Serum 2 · Omnisphere 2 · Sidechain Compression · Transient Shaping
audio.tech_zh: 48kHz/24bit · Serum 2 · Omnisphere 2 · 侧链压缩 · 瞬态塑形

video.title: Stranded
video.category_zh: 传统管弦乐作品 · 电影化叙事
video.description_zh: 一部六分钟的管弦乐叙事作品，以「搁浅—挣扎—救赎」的三段式结构展开。第一部分以低音弦乐的持续音簇开场，铜管声部以减七和弦与半音化线条叠加不安感，木管在高音区点缀短小的不协和动机。第二部分引入一个五音上行主题，由圆号首次呈示，随后在弦乐各声部间传递展开；和声从开篇的模糊调性逐步向 D 大调靠拢，配器密度也随情绪的上升而增加。第三部分是主题的光辉再现，全乐队以 ff 力度齐奏主题材料，铜管与弦乐形成对位交织，最终在 D 大调的主和弦上收束。作品展示了传统功能和声体系与电影配乐主题发展手法的结合运用。
video.description_en: A six-minute orchestral narrative work structured in three sections: stranded, struggling, and redeemed. The first section opens with low string clusters, with brass layering diminished seventh chords and chromatic lines to build unease, while woodwinds punctuate the upper register with short dissonant motifs. The second section introduces a five-note ascending theme, first stated by the horn and subsequently developed through the string sections; the harmony gradually clarifies from the opening's tonal ambiguity toward D major, with orchestration density increasing alongside the emotional arc. The third section is a triumphant restatement of the theme — the full orchestra plays the thematic material at ff, with brass and strings in contrapuntal dialogue, ultimately resolving on a D major tonic. The work demonstrates the integration of traditional functional harmony with film-scoring thematic development techniques.
video.tech: 4K · Symphonic Orchestra · Theme Development · Three-section Narrative Form · Counterpoint
video.tech_zh: 4K · 交响乐团编制 · 主题发展 · 三段式叙事结构 · 对位技法

video.title: Racheltjie De Beer
video.category_zh: 影视配乐 · 音画同步
video.description_zh: 为南非历史题材影视片段创作的原声配乐，时长 1 分 42 秒。配乐以钢琴的一个四音下行动机作为情感锚点贯穿全曲，弦乐四重奏以分部写作方式提供和声支撑与对位旋律。和声语言在关系大小调之间游移——当画面情绪倾向于内省时使用小调色彩，当人物产生情感连接时切换至大调——通过调式变换来配合画面中人物心理状态的变化。打击乐声部仅在关键剪辑点处进入，使用定音鼓的单次击打与镲的滚奏来加重画面转场的戏剧分量。音乐与画面的同步关系上，宏观结构跟随场景的情绪曲线，微观层面在几个重要剪辑点使用了精确的 hit point 对齐。整体配乐策略偏向「情感对位」而非严格的音画同步，即音乐不完全模仿画面动作，而是提供一个独立的、与画面平行的情感叙事层。
video.description_en: Original score composed for a South African historical film sequence, 1 minute 42 seconds in duration. The score uses a four-note descending piano motif as its emotional anchor throughout, with a string quartet providing harmonic support and contrapuntal lines through divisi writing. The harmonic language shifts between relative major and minor — adopting minor coloration when the visual emotion turns inward, switching to major when characters form emotional connections — using modal change to track the psychological states of the characters. The percussion section enters only at key cut points, using single timpani strikes and cymbal rolls to heighten the dramatic weight of scene transitions. In terms of music-image synchronization, the macro structure follows the scene's emotional curve, while at the micro level several important cut points feature precise hit point alignment. The overall scoring approach leans toward emotional counterpoint rather than strict Mickey-Mousing — the music does not fully mimic on-screen action but provides an independent, parallel emotional narrative layer.
video.tech: 4K · Film Scoring · Emotional Counterpoint · Hit Point Alignment · String Quartet Writing
video.tech_zh: 4K · 影视配乐 · 情感对位 · Hit Point 对齐 · 弦乐四重奏写作

video.title: 诡秘之主 PV
video.category: Game Music PV · Atmospheric Sound Design
video.category_zh: 游戏音乐 PV · 氛围声音设计
video.description_zh: 为游戏《诡秘之主》制作的 43 秒音乐宣传视频。由于时长极其有限，音乐采用「一次呼吸」式的单弧线结构——从开篇的低音量氛围铺垫到中段的紧张累积再到结尾的瞬间释放，形成一个完整但压缩的叙事曲线。声音素材上，低频使用了减法合成器产生的次低音持续音来提供不安的身体感，中频区域对钢琴采样进行了倒放与频谱拉伸处理，使其失去原有的音头辨识度而变成一种类似弦乐的陌生化音色，高频部分散布不规则的金属撞击声与颗粒合成音点来传递不确定的威胁信号。音乐与画面的同步精确到帧级别，低频的突然频谱抽离与瞬态骤入均对齐画面的关键剪辑点，在短视频格式内实现了氛围建立与情绪引导的功能。
video.description_en: A 43-second music promotional video created for the game 'Lord of the Mysteries'. Given the extremely limited duration, the music adopts a single-breath arc structure — from low-volume ambient establishment in the opening, through tension accumulation in the middle, to momentary release at the end — forming a complete but compressed narrative curve. In terms of sound materials, the low end uses subtractive-synthesized sub-bass drones to deliver visceral unease; the midrange applies reversal and spectral stretching to piano samples, stripping them of their original transient identity and transforming them into defamiliarized, string-like timbres; the high end scatters irregular metallic impacts and granular synthesis points to convey uncertain threat signals. Music-image synchronization is frame-precise, with sudden low-frequency spectral subtraction and transient entries aligned to key visual cut points. Within the short-form format, the piece fulfills the functional requirements of atmosphere establishment and emotional guidance.
video.tech: 1080p · Frame-precise Sync · Spectral Processing · Granular Synthesis · Single-arc Structure
video.tech_zh: 1080p · 帧级同步 · 频谱处理 · 颗粒合成 · 单弧线结构

video.title: Lies of P — Wwise Interactive Design
video.title_zh: 匹诺曹的谎言 — Wwise 交互设计
video.category: Game Audio Middleware · Interactive Music System
video.category_zh: 游戏音频中间件 · 交互音乐系统
video.description_zh: 以类魂动作游戏《匹诺曹的谎言》为蓝本的 Wwise 交互音乐设计完整技术演示。视频系统展示了从 DAW 音乐资源分层导出、Wwise 内事件与状态组配置、RTPC 实时参数控制映射到 Unity 引擎侧最终落地的全技术管线。核心亮点为「垂直叠加动态混音系统」的实现——通过将音乐拆分为环境层、节奏层、旋律层、强化层四条独立轨道，并分别映射血量百分比、玩家与敌人距离、战斗强度等级等游戏实时参数，实现对每层音轨音量、低通滤波截止频率、混响发送量的独立 RTPC 控制。最终实现从探索状态到 Boss 战状态的无缝音乐过渡，无明显的段落切换痕迹。演示还包含 Switch 容器内随机播放逻辑与 Transition 片段过渡时间的精细化调校。
video.description_en: A comprehensive technical demonstration of Wwise interactive music design based on the Soulslike action game 'Lies of P'. The video systematically presents the full technical pipeline from layered DAW music asset export, Wwise Event and State Group configuration, and RTPC real-time parameter mapping, to final Unity engine-side implementation. The core highlight is the Vertical Layering Dynamic Mix System — by splitting the music into four independent stems (ambient layer, rhythm layer, melody layer, intensity layer) and mapping each to real-time game parameters such as HP percentage, player-enemy distance, and combat intensity level, independent RTPC control is achieved for each stem's volume, low-pass filter cutoff frequency, and reverb send amount. The result is seamless musical transition from exploration state to boss combat state with no perceptible segment switching. The demonstration also covers randomized playback logic within Switch Containers and fine-tuned Transition segment timing.
video.tech: Wwise · Vertical Layering · RTPC Mapping · State Groups · Switch Containers · Unity Integration
video.tech_zh: Wwise · 垂直叠加 · RTPC 参数映射 · 状态组 · Switch 容器 · Unity 引擎集成
